title: Good Stuff
excerpt: Here's a little sneak peek at a layout that will be appearing in the Garden at Two Peas In A Bucket soon. I used a brand new stamp set by the ever-so-talented Kelly Purkey . Exclusively at Two Peas, KP…
body:
Here's a little sneak peek at a layout that will be appearing in the Garden at Two Peas In A Bucket soon. I used a brand new stamp set by the ever-so-talented Kelly Purkey. Exclusively at Two Peas, KP appropriately named this brilliant grouping, Bright Idea.

Bright idea indeed.
